pi_items.source: Task description: 'Create a shopping cart price rule named BACK2SCHOOL25'
Task description: '25% discount'. Magento standard for percentage-based discount. Verifier accepts 'by_percent' or 'percent'.
Task description: 'gives a 25% discount for the General customer group'. Verifier checks amount equals 25 (±0.01).
Task description: 'auto-generated coupons with the prefix B2S'. Export script validates using LIKE 'b2s%' match.
Task description: 'Generate exactly 10 codes'. Verifier awards 25 pts for all 10 B2S coupons generated.
Task description: 'set 5 uses per coupon'. Stored in salesrule.uses_per_coupon column.
Task description: '1 use per customer'. Stored in salesrule.uses_per_customer column.
Task description: 'General customer group only'. Standard Magento group with ID=1. Verifier checks salesrule_customer_group table for group assignment.
Task description: 'orders with a subtotal of at least $75'. Stored in conditions_serialized JSON blob. Export script searches for base_subtotal and value '75'.
Task description: 'set the expiry to 12/31/2025'. Converted to ISO 8601 format. Stored in salesrule.to_date column.

privileged_info_summary: The cart_price_rule task requires creating a Magento shopping cart promotion with the rule name BACK2SCHOOL25, applying a 25% discount (by_percent type) on cart subtotals of $75 or more for the General customer group only. Auto-generated coupon codes must use the B2S prefix with exactly 10 codes generated, 5 uses per coupon, 1 use per customer, and expiry date of December 31, 2025. The rule data is synthetic (created during task execution). All metadata values are directly specified in the task description and are consistent with Magento database schema (salesrule table for rule properties, salesrule_customer_group for customer group assignment, conditions_serialized for subtotal condition, and salesrule_coupon for coupon codes).
